title: avena strigosa var. atherantha
intro: Avena strigosa var. atherantha, also known as oat grass, is a type of wild oat plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for relieving digestive issues and soothing muscle spasms. The health benefits of Avena strigosa var. atherantha include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. In herbal preparations, oat grass can be consumed as a tea, taken as a tincture, or added to bath waters for its calming effects.
